description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a zip-up jacket over a shirt and a pair of straight-cut jeans. The figure has a well-defined face with a short beard and wears glasses, adding to the realism and detail of the model. The hands are extended horizontally to the sides, and the fingers are slightly separated, typical of a T-pose. The shoes are sturdy and practical, suitable for walking on city streets or sidewalks. The hair is short and closely cropped, and the overall build is average, with a naturalistic body proportion. The clothing and accessories suggest a modern, everyday city dweller.
description: A casually dressed adult male with a jacket, jeans, glasses, and short hair, standing in a T-pose. The figure has realistic facial features and urban attire.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face, glasses, jacket, shirt, and full frontal detail of the clothing and posture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the arm's extension, and the side seam of the jacket and jeans.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, jacket, and jeans, with both arms extended outward.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the face, the arm's extension, and the side seam of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: casual zip-up jacket over a shirt and straight-cut jeans
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
